content:
Here are bookstores near Arlington Heights, IL:

1. [Barnes & Noble Arlington Heights](https://stores.barnesandnoble.com/store/2089) - Why: Barnes & Noble Arlington Heights is a bookstores with source-backed location evidence in Arlington Heights. Location evidence: Found on the search result source page for Arlington Heights, IL.
2. [Half Price Books Palatine](https://www.hpb.com/store?storeid=HPB-032) - Why: Half Price Books Palatine is a bookstores with source-backed location evidence in Palatine near Arlington Heights.
3. [The Book Stall](https://www.thebookstall.com/) - Why: The Book Stall is a bookstores with source-backed location evidence in Winnetka near Arlington Heights.
